creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Zstandard (zstd) version 1.5.7 was released last week, introducing significant performance enhancements and bug fixes[1]

We have zstd 1.5.2 in the base system. It was released 3+ years ago and there are 1772 commits to dev since this release.

1.https://github.com/facebook/zstd/releases/tag/v1.5.7
